assessment: M10 mirror-specific performance, output, plotting, documentation, and focused coverage gates pass. The 20-file mirror backend remains within its module budget, every core module is at or below 999 lines, and all 569 public API-like definitions have docstrings. Mirror plotting now lives with mirror output while its former core import remains compatible. Solver kernels, runtime setup, and host orchestration have distinct ownership without changing public behavior. Every executable example is indexed from the tutorials, the documented equations link to their implementations, and the audited functionality matrix defines supported, research, deferred, external, and unsupported scope. The aggregate package is inside the revised evidence-based 30-34k line budget; the 14,197-line test suite remains inside its evidence-preserving 15k budget. The ordinary core CI coverage combine continues to omit mirror because it intentionally excludes nightly adjoint tests; the reproducible mirror release audit is separate.
